'''''Colada''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It attempted to evacuate the [[Goff Platform]]. Realizing that the most serious danger to the craft evacuating the platform came from the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]'', it made its two starfighter squadrons [[Azul Squadron]] and [[Grez Squadron]] focus attacks on the Compellor. However, [[Avenger Squadron]] managed to destroy both squadrons down to the last starfighter. They then attacked the Colada and reduced its shields. The [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']] then demanded its surrender, a demand they refused, and as a result their ship was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
